topics.hook: 골킥도 그대로 골이 될 수 있습니다
topics.fact: 골킥은 상대 골문에 직접 들어가면 득점이다. 단 자기 골문에 직접 들어가면 상대 코너킥으로 재개한다.

topics.pitchCheckBridge: 골킥 하나도 재개 규칙이 있듯, 팀 일정도 재개 지점이 명확해야 덜 헷갈린다.

topics.motionIdea: 골키퍼 발끝에서 공 궤적 라인이 쭉 뻗는 장면

candidates.title: File:Free kick to Peterborough at Old Trafford football stadium - geograph.org.uk - 2433402.jpg
candidates.description: The Football League 1 play-off final has historically been played at Wembley stadium but in 2011 it was transferred to Manchester United's ground. Manchester United had actually played at Wembley less than 24 hours before this match, in the European cup final, resulting in the Wembley pitch being unusable in such a short space of time for this match. At this stage of the game with a few minutes to go Peterborough United were beating Huddersfield Town 2 - 0 and from this resulting free kick the Peterborough captain, Grant McCann, scored the 3rd and final goal and assuring The Posh will be playing in the Football League Championship next season.

topics.motionIdea: 공이 튕겨도 타이머 숫자가 계속 내려가는 연출
